feat: tarot poem catalog + Sing to Me via Ouracle

- 22 Major Arcana poems written and voice-mapped (Dickinson, Blake, Whitman, Hopkins, Yeats, Rilke, Rumi, Keats)
- lib/tarot.ts: typed 78-card catalog with full deck stubs and helpers
- app/api/draw/route.ts: proxy to api.ouracle.kerry.ink/draw
- SingToMe component: draws random card from all 20 Ouracle decks, fades in with deck label + body, "Write from here" drops text into editor
- Font selector moved from header into editor action bar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign UI with blurred album art background and hover-expand controls

- Replace static layout with compact mini-player matching Spotify's style
- Blurred album art fills window background, updated per track change
- Window animates height on hover (110→158px) to reveal playback controls
- RectangleGeometry clip on root grid ensures perfect rounded corners during animation
- Shuffle and repeat buttons now functional: toggle state via SMTC API
- Active shuffle/repeat shown in green; repeat icon switches for Track mode
- Removed volume slider from UI to match compact player design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3-line descriptions under every news headline

- get_description() builds exactly 3 sentences per article:
  uses RSS summary first, pads with source/context fallbacks
  if the feed provides too little text
- truncate limit raised 420 → 700 chars for richer summaries
- Both email and web cards use get_description()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ui: rounded corner accents (obloucek), visible, fix ActionProtocol clipping

- hud-c4 corners: sharp L → rounded arc via border-*-radius: 7px (matches rounded-lg)
- border 1px → 1.5px, opacity 0.30 → 0.60 (more visible like SOURCE_VALIDATION)
- size 12px → 14px, position -1px → 0px (inside box, safe with overflow:hidden)
- ActionProtocol: removed overflow:hidden — was clipping corner spans at 0px edge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite H14 to use projection-based attribution (no gradients)

Gradient-based attribution OOMs on 32B fp16 — even a partial
forward through 40 layers needs too much activation memory for
backprop. Switch to projection-based: measure each token's hidden
state projection onto the sycophancy direction at the target layer.
One forward pass per stimulus, no gradients, no OOM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Inline rendering (e9a9703) broke:
- white/unstyled content (viewer.css not loaded in parent frame)
- missing Tisk/Print button (was in viewer.html topbar)
- missing close ✕ (dynamic import issues)

commit.message:
Fix H14 OOM: partial forward pass instead of full model backprop

For 32B fp16, backprop through all 64 layers needs ~8GB+ for
intermediate activations, exceeding VRAM headroom. Now only
forward through layers 0..target_layer and backprop through
that partial graph. Also cleans up GPU memory between stimuli.

commit.message:
refactor(research): agent-owns-research mode - agents do their own tool-based discovery

Agent 自主调研模式：不预采集数据，4 个 Agent 各自使用工具搜索、分析、辩论。
移除 discover/collect 等预采集步骤，改为 Discussion 中 Agent 自主使用 WebSearch/gh api 调研。
保留讨论日记（SecondBrain/Inbox/调研内容）和最终报告（Tech/）。

commit.message:
feat: semantic similarity lookup for sign KB, bug fixes, Docker model caching

- Add sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) semantic fallback in
  _build_knowledge_context(): exact match first, then cosine similarity
  against 100 KB key embeddings for synonym resolution (e.g. GLAD → happy).
  Threshold: 0.60. No vector DB needed — 100-vector numpy array in memory.

- Pre-cache sentence-transformers model in Docker image at build time
  (ENV HF_HOME=/app/.cache/huggingface) to eliminate cold-start downloads.

Bug fixes:
- app.py: run asl_graph.invoke() via asyncio.to_thread() to avoid blocking
  the async event loop during translation requests
- config.py: move production CORS extension into __init__() — class-body
  if-statement ran at definition time and never applied production origins
- database.py: guard Feedback.__repr__ against null query (TypeError on slice)
- auth.py: replace != with hmac.compare_digest() for timing-safe password check
- ThemeContext.tsx: remove incorrect type cast that excluded 'auto' from type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add no-cache headers for rewrite routes (/app/, /hud, /)

Pattern /(.*\.html) matches only direct .html URLs, not rewrite sources.
Vercel CDN was caching /app/ (Age: 33409s) despite no-store headers
because /app/ != /app/index.html pattern match.

Added explicit no-cache rules for /app, /hud, / rewrite paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Finder-launched apps get minimal PATH (/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin).
build-image.sh now augments PATH on macOS and resolves podman via
absolute path. Rust passes PODMAN_PATH env var to the script.

- handlers.rs, runner.rs: pass PODMAN_PATH when spawning build script

commit.message:
CRITICAL: fix multi-tenant data isolation — RLS enforcement + tenant_id injection

ROOT CAUSE: Production DATABASE_URL used postgres superuser, which
BYPASSES all RLS policies. All tenants saw all data.

Fix (two layers of defense):

1. RLS enforcement (setup_rls.py):
   - Creates saas_app non-superuser role on startup
   - Applies FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY on all 24 tenant tables
   - Entrypoint rewrites DATABASE_URL to use saas_app after setup
   - Migrations/setup still use postgres (ADMIN_DATABASE_URL)

2. Explicit tenant_id injection (21 endpoints):
   - Every model creation now sets tenant_id=token.tenant_id
   - Defense in depth: even if RLS fails, data is correctly tagged
   - Fixed: unidades, clientes, operaciones (incl. retoma),
     cheques (recibidos + emitidos + cobro), caja_diaria,
     cierres_caja, costos_directos, proveedores, interesados,
     seguimientos, peritajes, documentacion, archivos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix openSUSE NVIDIA driver version mismatch via kmp-meta package

The previous approach of installing kmp-default + video + compute-utils
individually caused a Driver/library version mismatch (NVML 595.58 vs
kmp 595.45) because libnvidia-ml from the standard OSS non-free repo
lags behind the NVIDIA GFX repo userspace packages.

Fix:
- Remove any existing NVIDIA packages before install to clear stale fragments
- Install nvidia-open-driver-G0{6,7}-signed-kmp-meta (the meta package)
  which co-installs kmp-default + all userspace at the same version
- Drop cuda repo (not needed — the GFX repo meta package handles it)
- Add zypper locks on libnvidia-ml / libnvidia-cfg to prevent OSS non-free
  packages from drifting in on future zypper dup
- Pre-signed kmp packages don't need kernel-devel/headers, so remove those

Tested: RTX 4000 SFF Ada (AD104) on openSUSE Leap 16.0, nvidia-smi works
without reboot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: make all Alembic migrations idempotent for existing databases

Migrations 002 and 003 now check if columns/types already exist before
applying changes. This allows `alembic upgrade head` to run safely on
databases that were created before Alembic was introduced.

Also adds entrypoint.sh to auto-run migrations on deploy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix zypper repo URLs for NVIDIA CUDA and Container Toolkit on openSUSE

zypper cannot use yum .repo file URLs as repository locations. Replace
all three with direct baseurls:

  cuda:                  .../repos/suse16/x86_64  (not cuda-suse16.repo)
  nvidia-container-toolkit: .../stable/rpm/x86_64  (not nvidia-container-toolkit.repo)

Also import the Container Toolkit GPG key via rpm --import before
refreshing the repo, and remove any stale repo entry before re-adding,
to handle idempotent re-runs cleanly.

Tested on openSUSE Leap 16.0 (avatar.conflict.industries).

commit.message:
fix: fly machine start requires explicit machine ID, not just app name

fly machine start has no --wait-timeout flag and requires <id> args.
Look up machine IDs from fly machine list --json and start each one,
then sleep 3s for sshd before retrying the proxy.
